Hero.description: Stop wrestling with generic chat assistants. aiagentflow is a local-first, multi-agent framework built specifically for software engineering. Architect, code, review, and test—all from your terminal.

Terminal.step1: $ aiagentflow run "Build a REST API for user auth"
Terminal.step4: Task: Build a REST API for user auth

Pipeline.description: We replaced chaotic LLM loops with a strict Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) of specialized engineering personas. Predictable inputs, locally verified outputs.

step1.title: Analyze & Plan
step1.description: The Architect Agent analyzes your codebase and drafts a solid implementation plan before a single line of code is written.

step2.title: Smart Coding
step2.description: The Coder Agent executes the plan, writing clean, maintainable code across your entire stack.

step3.title: Automated Review
step3.description: The Reviewer Agent audits the code for bugs, security vulnerabilities, and style guide adherence.

step4.title: Test & Validate
step4.description: The Tester Agent writes unit tests while the Fixer Agent automatically resolves any review comments or failing tests. Finally, the Judge ensures all requirements are met.

Features.description: Everything you need to ship software faster, directly from your terminal. No cloud lock-in, no data leaks, no context exhaustion.

feature1.title: Local-First
feature1.description: Your code stays on your machine. No sending proprietary architecture to third-party servers.

feature2.title: Framework Agnostic
feature2.description: Works with React, Vue, Node, Python, and more. If you can build it, our agents can orchestrate it.

feature3.title: Reliable Outputs
feature3.description: By injecting your existing architecture docs, API specs, and PRDs as direct context, we eliminate hallucinations and align the output to your specific coding standards.

feature4.title: Self-Healing
feature4.description: Built-in Fixer, Judge, and Tester agents automatically detect, retry, and resolve errors before you even see them.

feature5.title: Extensible
feature5.description: Write custom agents or tweak prompts to match your team’s specific coding standards and workflow.

feature6.title: Streaming & Auto-Detection
feature6.description: Watch agents code in real-time with --stream. Automatically detects available models from Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, and Ollama.

Install.description: Add @aiagentflow/cli to any Node.js project. Our zero-dependency engine ensures your environment stays clean.

Demo.description: Whether integrating into your workflow or via CLI, aiagentflow adapts perfectly to your way of working.

feature.label: New Feature
feature.cli: aiagentflow run "Build a responsive Next.js header" --context docs/design-system.md

bugfix.label: Bug Fix
bugfix.request: Fix race condition in auth middleware
bugfix.cli: aiagentflow run "Fix race condition in auth middleware when handling concurrent logins" \\\n    --stream \\\n    --auto \\\n    --context src/middleware/auth.ts

refactor.label: Refactor
refactor.cli: aiagentflow plan docs/refactor-spec.md -o tasks.txt\n\naiagentflow run --batch tasks.txt --auto

anthropic.title: Anthropic (Claude)
anthropic.description: Ideal for complex architectures. Optimized for claude-sonnet-3.5 and above.

openai.title: OpenAI (GPT-4o)
openai.description: Pure speed for task execution and smart agent routing.

gemini.title: Google Gemini
gemini.description: Leverage its massive context window to analyze entire repositories in a second.

ollama.title: Ollama (Local Models)
ollama.description: Total privacy and zero cost. Run Llama 3 or DeepSeek directly on your machine.

Community.headline: From the community, for the community
Community.description: aiagentflow is an MIT-licensed project. Join hundreds of devs shaping the future of autonomous engineering.

Footer.description: Open source multi-agent orchestration framework. For developers, by developers.
